title: The Wrong Millionaire
writer: Oscar Rydqvist, Paul Merzbach, Henri Verdun
actors: Fridolf Rhudin, Zarah Leander, Ingert Bjuggren
plot: The young millionaire Fridolf Johnson and his secretary comes back to Sweden from USA. The millionaire wants to have peace and quiet and change places with his secretary. The silly secretary really takes the opportunity to live th...
